---
title: REPORT OF ANALYSIS
date: today
date-format: long

format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    template: templates/template.typ
    template-partials:
      - templates/page.typ
      - templates/typst-template.typ
      - templates/typst-show.typ
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
| &deg;C works, but \u{00B0} doesn't.
| In Typst, the opposite is true.

*Hello there!* **General Kenobi!**
:::

# Introduction

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Traceability Statement

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# Experimental

## Safety

Hazard Review 646.03.0052: Compressed gas cylinder transport and use.

## Materials

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Sample Preparation

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Equipment and Instrumentation

* Thermo Scientific 42iQHL Chemiluminescence Analyzer (NIST #N121055)
* COGAS #20
* Keithly 2100 Digital Multimeter (NIST #1424390, NIST #1424246)

## Instrumental Method

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Quantitation and Procedure

### Statistical Analysis

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

### Homogeneity Analysis

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

### Stability

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# Results and Discussion

## Value Assignment of Lot Standards

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

### Analysis of Previous Lot Standards

{{< lipsum 3 >}}

## Value Assignment of Samples

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Uncertainty Assessment

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Disposition of Cylinders

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

# Data Storage

* Notebook 1
* File 1
* File 2
* File 3

{{< pagebreak >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
